args.query:
SELECT ep.sentiment, COUNT(*) as count,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) as pct
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'col_p7r9v2x4z1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY ep.sentiment ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT ep.channel_type, COUNT(*) as posts,
  ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(pe.likes, 0)), 1) as avg_likes,
  ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(pe.views, 0)), 1) as avg_views
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
LEFT JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.post_engagements` pe ON p.post_id = pe.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'col_p7r9v2x4z1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.post_id ORDER BY pe.fetched_at DESC) = 1
GROUP BY ep.channel_type ORDER BY posts DESC

WITH theme_trends AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(p.posted_at), WEEK) as week,
    theme,
    COUNT(*) as post_count
  FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p
  JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep ON p.post_id = ep.post_id,
  UNNEST(ep.themes) theme
  WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
    AND theme IN ('product complaints', 'user tutorials', 'competitor mentions')
    AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT 
  CAST(week AS STRING) as week, 
  theme, 
  post_count 
FROM theme_trends 
ORDER BY week ASC, theme ASC

WITH theme_volume AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(p.posted_at), WEEK) as week,
    theme,
    COUNT(*) as post_count
  FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p
  JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep ON p.post_id = ep.post_id,
  UNNEST(ep.themes) theme
  WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
    AND theme IN ('product complaints', 'user tutorials', 'competitor mentions')
    AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT 
  CAST(week AS STRING) as week, 
  theme, 
  post_count 
FROM theme_volume 
ORDER BY week ASC, theme ASC

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC(DATE(p.posted_at), WEEK) as week,
  theme,
  COUNT(*) as post_count
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep ON p.post_id = ep.post_id,
UNNEST(ep.themes) theme
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND theme IN ('product complaints', 'user tutorials', 'competitor mentions')
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1 ASC, 2 ASC

SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(p.posted_at), WEEK) as week,
    theme,
    COUNT(*) as post_count
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep ON p.post_id = ep.post_id,
UNNEST(ep.themes) theme
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND theme IN ('product complaints', 'user tutorials', 'competitor mentions')
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1 ASC, 2 ASC

WITH weekly_themes AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(p.posted_at), WEEK) as week_start,
    theme,
    COUNT(*) as volume
  FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p
  JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep ON p.post_id = ep.post_id,
  UNNEST(ep.themes) theme
  WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
    AND theme IN ('product complaints', 'user tutorials', 'competitor mentions')
    AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
growth_calc AS (
  SELECT
    week_start,
    theme,
    volume,
    LAG(volume) OVER (PARTITION BY theme ORDER BY week_start) as prev_volume
  FROM weekly_themes
)
SELECT 
  CAST(week_start AS STRING) as week,
  theme,
  volume,
  prev_volume,
  ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(volume - prev_volume, prev_volume) * 100, 1) as growth_pct
FROM growth_calc
WHERE prev_volume IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY week_start DESC, growth_pct DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT ep.sentiment, COUNT(*) as count,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) as percentage
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY ep.sentiment ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT DATE(p.posted_at) as post_date, p.platform, COUNT(*) as post_count
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY post_date, p.platform ORDER BY post_date

SELECT ep.sentiment, COUNT(*) as count,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 1) as pct
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY ep.sentiment ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT theme, COUNT(*) as post_count,
  ROUND(AVG(ep.sentiment), 2) as avg_sentiment
FROM `social-listening-pl.social_listening.enriched_posts` ep, UNNEST(ep.themes) theme
JOIN `social-listening-pl.social_listening.posts` p ON p.post_id = ep.post_id
WHERE p.collection_id = 'eval-collection-1'
  AND ep.is_related_to_task IS NOT FALSE
GROUP BY theme ORDER BY post_count DESC LIMIT 5
